title: Setting Up Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA / TOTP)
text:
Q: How do I set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) using TOTP?
A: To set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) using Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP), follow these steps: Windows: Step 1 - Open your web browser and log in to your company account. Step 2 - Navigate to the security settings, usually found under 'Account' or 'Security'. Step 3 - Look for the option to enable Multi-Factor Authentication and select it. Step 4 - Choose 'Authenticator App' as your method and follow the prompts to generate a QR code. macOS: Step 1 - Open your web browser and log in to your company account. Step 2 - Go to the security settings, typically located under 'Account' or 'Security'. Step 3 - Find the Multi-Factor Authentication option and click to enable it. Step 4 - Select 'Authenticator App' and a QR code will be generated. Windows: Step 5 - Download an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Microsoft Authenticator from the Microsoft Store. macOS: Step 5 - Download an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Microsoft Authenticator from the App Store. Windows: Step 6 - Open the authenticator app, select 'Add Account', and scan the QR code displayed on your screen. macOS: Step 6 - Open the authenticator app, click 'Add Account', and scan the QR code displayed on your screen. Windows: Step 7 - Enter the verification code generated by the app back into your company account to complete the setup. macOS: Step 7 - Enter the verification code generated by the app back into your company account to finalize the setup. You should now have MFA enabled for your account, enhancing your security.
